tagline: The analyst you always wished you had

sections.title: YouKnow
sections.subtitle: The analyst you always wished you had
body: The world is rapidly shifting toward AI-powered data workflows. Solutions like Gemini, Claude, and built-in AI on top of BigQuery are making it easier than ever to access and query data.
Most of these tools provide answers. We are building an analyst.

YouKnow is a system that replicates — and improves upon — the best analyst you could have on your team: one that understands the business, understands the data, remembers everything, asks the right questions — and has an obsession with driving impact through action.

sections.title: Not another AI — a team of analysts working for you
body: Instead of a single generic model sitting on top of your data, YouKnow behaves like a team of analysts.

columns.heading: Analysts who think like leaders
items: Think in terms of business decisions
Focus on impact, not just analysis

columns.heading: Beyond answering questions
items: Help refine the problem until it becomes actionable

sections.callout: A shift from querying data to thinking with an analyst.

sections.title: Utility-first — from data to decisions, actions, and impact
body: Most AI solutions stop at insights.
YouKnow is built around a simple principle: analysis that doesn't lead to action is not enough.

columns.heading: The full workflow
items: Connecting to execution systems (ads, tracking, etc.)

columns.heading: Example: conversion dropped 20%
items: How to validate whether the fix worked

sections.callout: This turns data from something you analyze into something you operate your business with.

sections.title: Deep knowledge of marketing systems + access to real data
body: Most tools operate on a single data layer — the warehouse. YouKnow is connected to the actual systems.

columns.heading: System-level access
items: Understands platforms like Meta and Google at a deep level
Accesses data directly from the source, not just processed layers
Compares across systems (ads platforms vs tracking vs BI)

sections.callout: This distinction is critical — and often where wrong decisions are made.

sections.title: Built for how data actually works (and breaks)
body: Real-world data is messy, incomplete, and biased. YouKnow is designed for that reality.

columns.heading: Data quality awareness
items: Knows when to use raw vs aggregated data

columns.heading: Beyond analysis
items: Recommends how to improve measurement itself
Not just how to improve performance

sections.callout: Combines the mindset of: analyst + marketer + data scientist + statistician.

sections.title: Full organizational memory and business context
body: This is one of the most important differentiators.
YouKnow doesn't start from scratch — it builds a persistent understanding of the business over time.

columns.heading: In context
items: "This happened before due to a tracking issue"
"There was a launch last week that may explain this"
"This campaign was modified two days ago"

sections.callout: This turns it from an AI tool into an analyst that truly knows your company.

sections.title: Proactive by design — not waiting for questions
body: Most tools are reactive. YouKnow behaves like a real analyst.

columns.heading: Always-on intelligence
items: Pushes insights to the right stakeholders
Asks questions that guide better thinking

sections.callout: It doesn't wait to be asked — it initiates conversations that lead to impact.

sections.title: Tailored to your business — metrics, definitions, and language

columns.heading: Custom-built for you
items: Builds custom metrics specific to your business
Aligns with your goals and definitions

sections.callout: This allows it to speak the language of the business, not just the data.

sections.title: Becomes part of the team — onboarding and integration
body: YouKnow is not just a tool you install — it joins your team.

columns.heading: True integration
items: Learns your systems, goals, and structure
Works directly with business users, not just analysts
Guides them all the way to decisions

sections.callout: It behaves like an analyst joining a company — but at a completely different scale.

sections.title: Why we win
body: AI on top of data will become a commodity. The ability to consistently turn data into real business impact will not.
pillars: Understands the systems that generate it
sections.principle: An obsession with actions that drive real impact.

sections.title: Bottom line
sections.body: Everyone will give you AI that answers questions about data.
sections.emphasis: YouKnow gives you the analyst that helps you run your business with it.
